title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched SuperComputer, a cloud platform enabling AI agents to build, deploy, host, and run software with full Ubuntu environment access including databases, storage, SSH, GitHub, and AWS integration. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live application deployment for AI agents.
